title: hieracium viride subsp. trachyticum
intro: Hieracium viride subsp. trachyticum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving antioxidant defenses. Hieracium viride subsp. trachyticum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal use.
